supported_devices: Bluelab peristaltic pumps (120 ml/min, 450 ml/min, 1400 ml/min), 24 VDC irrigation pumps and solenoid valves
port_types: BNC (pH probe), EC probe connector, temperature probe connector, 8–9x 24 VDC pump outputs, USB-B
compatible_sensors: Bluelab pH probe (BNC), Bluelab conductivity probe, temperature probe
compatible_irrigation: any 24 VDC pump or solenoid valve
supported_manufacturer_series: Bluelab Peristaltic Pump 120 ml, Bluelab Peristaltic Pump 450 ml, Bluelab Peristaltic Pump 1400 ml
recommended_use_note: Commercial and advanced hobby pH, EC, and fertigation controller; up to 9-part nutrient dosing and 4 independent irrigation stations; works with NFT, DWC, soil, drip, and aeroponics
uvp_notes: EU Bluelab official store lists at €1,968; US bluelab.com lists at $1,574 USD; US retailer HydroBuilder at $1,399 USD.
notes: Wi-Fi connectivity requires separate Bluelab IntelliLink purchase (sold separately); IntelliLink uses USB connection to IntelliDose then connects via 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi to IntelliGrow/Edenic cloud. Formerly an Autogrow product, now part of Bluelab ecosystem after Excel Seeds acquisition. Supports proportional dosing and sequential pump control. Day/night EC targets. Up to 9-part dosing OR up to 5-part dosing + 4 irrigation stations. Large graphical LCD with 4-key interface. pH range 2–12, EC 0–10, temp 0–50°C. Dimensions from US retailer listing (may include packaging).
